#  Create a Payment Schedule (Legacy) 
#####  Legacy Content
This page details the legacy experience for the Project level Commitments tool.
##  Background 
Construction businesses operating in Australia and New Zealand are creating payment schedules to facilitate the invoice approval process, as well as claims of work performed by [downstream collaborators](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). In a typical payment schedule workflow, downstream collaborators submit invoices for work performed. The [upstream collaborator](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) reviews the invoice and approves the amounts on the claim.
#####  Note
![Flag Australia](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/fab831663a024b58dea50fb713ee32c2/3218883906587327e38a6f61f0da2db5/flag-australia.png?fm=webp&h=14) The Payment Schedule feature is designed for Procore users in Australia and New Zealand to satisfy the legal requirement to provide claimants with a payment schedule. However, this feature is available for use by all Invoice Management users.
A payment schedule is then created for the invoice to show the following information:
  * Claimed amounts
  * All 'Approved' amounts
  * Reasons for 'Rejected' amounts


##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/permissions)
  * **Additional Information:**
    * To automatically notify an [invoice contact](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) by email when an invoice's status changes to 'Approved', see [Configure Settings: Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-commitments).
    * To define custom text for the footer on the payment schedule's PDF export file, see [Configure Settings: Commitments](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-commitments).


##  Prerequisites 
  * Turn the 'Show Amounts Subcontractors Claim' setting ON. See [Configure Settings: Invoicing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/configure-settings-invoicing).
  * Complete the steps in [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices).
  * For amounts to show on a Payment Schedule, amounts must be entered in the 'Work Completed This Period' and 'Materials Presently Stored' columns on the invoice's Schedule of Values. To learn how to enter these amounts, see:
    * [Create a Subcontractor Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/invoice-administrator-guide/create-subcontractor-invoices)
    * [Bulk Edit a Schedule of Values](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/manage-rows-and-columns-on-a-subcontractor-invoices-schedule-of-values)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the Project level **Commitments** tool.
  2. Click the **Contracts** tab.
  3. Locate the commitment associated with the invoice that you want to create the payment schedule for.
  4. Click the commitment's **Number** link to open it.
  5. Click the **Invoices** tab.
  6. Choose from these options:
     * Locate the invoice line item in the table. Then click the **PDF** ![Icon Pdf](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/e3552a26e439106d077fb850b127b699/79aa88e1464551433dd054f5ad23c8af/icon-pdf.png?fm=webp) icon on the right side of the line item.   
OR
     * Locate the invoice line item in the table, then click its **View** button. Click the **Export** button and choose **PDF** from the drop-down menu.


The example below shows you a sample payment schedule.
##### Example
The illustration below shows you an example of a payment schedule.
![Payment Schedule Doc Summary](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/741eed01b88d0a75b8dcd3f48c3772a7/35d4f82289d95aeffd6b5bba16400f12/payment-schedule-doc-summary.png?fm=webp)
![Payment Schedule Doc Detail](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/d4db9bea9ab4c2c5c02b14251bb4b4e9/214323d431244104d1130b24e2423beb/payment-schedule-doc-detail.png?fm=webp)

  * [Create an Invoice on Behalf of an Invoice Contact (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-an-invoice-on-behalf-of-an-invoice-contact-legacy)
  * [Create a Purchase Order (Legacy)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order)
title: Create a Payment Schedule (Legacy)
description: How to create a payment schedule that contains subcontractor claimed amounts, approved amounts, and reasons for the difference between claimed and approved amounts.
